mapper.select: select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.pos_name, e.emp_email, e.emp_mobile, e.emp_status, e.hire_date from employee e join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id order by pos_order, emp_no

select e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, d.dept_name, p.pos_name, e.emp_email, e.emp_mobile, e.emp_status, e.hire_date, e.dept_id, e.pos_id, e.created_at, e.updated_at from employee e join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where e.emp_id = #{empId}
